description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 구조와 디지털 데이터 오류의 정교한 융합으로, 글리치 아트의 관점을 통해 KURO-X 코어의 휘발성 진화를 시각화했습니다.
description.en: A sophisticated fusion of sharp geometric structures and digital data corruption, visualizing the volatile evolution of the KURO-X core through a glitch-art lens.

prompt: KURO-X cybernetic entity, techwear aesthetic, sharp geometric shapes, floating polyhedral shards, digital glitch distortion, pixel sorting effects, chromatic aberration, deep black and neon violet color scheme, hyper-detailed vector art, high contrast, cyberpunk atmosphere, 8k resolution, data corruption artifacts
